name: flow-02-compatibility-scoring-convergence
description: T51 CompatibilityScoringConvergence — CONVERGENCE archetype. B1 reads GLOBAL matching profiles only; 30s timeout is a success mode (partialResults:true). B2 builds connection suggestions from B1 output.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: timeout-as-success-mode, global-index-only, weight-sum contract
Retrieve CONVERGENCE arch pattern + timeout-as-success-mode + partial-input-partial-output patterns for T51
Break T51 into: B1 (weighted scoring, GLOBAL-only read, timeout→partialResults) + B2 (suggestion generation, forwards partialResults)

Generate compatibility-scoring.service.ts: B1 reads xiigen-matching-profiles (GLOBAL) only, 30s timeout in quality.successModes (not failureModes), partialResults:true on timeout, weight sum=1.0 validation. B2 suggestion-service forwards partialResults flag.
Named check validation: timeout_as_success_mode, global_index_read_only, weight_sum_validation
Score generated code 0-100 against T51 iron rules: timeout classification, GLOBAL index isolation, weight sum, partialResults propagation
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=timeout-as-success-mode (partialResults:true in successModes, GLOBAL-only), rejected=timeout-as-failure (timeout in failureModes, reads xiigen-business-profiles). curriculumTier=3.
